name: Drakgoon
description: The Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Drakgoon flak cannon sends volleys of intensely hot shrapnel ricocheting around the room. Can be fired in wide or concentrated bursts.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing texture on Drakgoon’s default projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.7 + 29.6.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a significant performance drop related to the Unreal Drakgoon Flak Cannon Skin projectile trails.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed numerous projectile weapons (Detron, Drakgoon, Cernos Prime, etc) having incorrect Status Chance calculations.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload circle turning blue after using a Charge trigger type weapon (Drakgoon, Rakta Cernos, etc). The intended color is white when reloading.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 19.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance of a number of projectile weapons including Drakgoon and NPC weapons that behave similarly.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Changed the Fatal Acceleration Mod to display a Drakgoon instead of a Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed innate punchthrough not functioning properly for the Drakgoon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance on the Torid and Drakgoon Effects.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed status chance for projectile weapons that shot multiple pellets (Drakgoon/Detron).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Drakgoon now uses shotgun ammo instead of rifle ammo.
Tweaked Drakgoon sound effects.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed custom colors not being applied to Drakgoon.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.6.0
patchlogs.additions:
Drakgoon Flak cannon available now!
Send volleys of hot shrapnel flying and dominate the enemy with the Drakgoon Flak Cannon! Fire it in wide bursts to target multiple enemies or take aim and attack with a powerful, concentrated shot.
